title: Set Smart Campaign Goals
description: Ready to transform your email campaigns from tactical activities to strategic powerhouses? This Short Course was created to help marketing professionals accomplish measurable campaign success through strategic goal-setting. By completing this course, you'll be able to apply the SMART framework to create compelling campaign objectives, align email goals with broader business strategies, and communicate these targets effectively to stakeholders. By the end of this course, you will be able to discuss why strategic thinking is essential in crafting email marketing campaigns and list key performance goals for an upcoming campaign that align with business objectives. This course is unique because it bridges the gap between high-level strategic thinking and practical campaign execution, providing you with a framework that differentiates strategic marketers from operational executors. To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic email marketing concepts and campaign execution.
